name: spy-momentum
description: Autonomous SPY day trading strategy research with walk-forward validation
parse_metric: uv run python backtester/backtester.py strategies/momentum.py 2>/dev/null | head -1
data_description: 1-minute SPY bars from Alpaca, cached as monthly parquet files
context: Autonomous trading strategy research for SPY day trading. Walk-forward backtester with 2 training windows + holdout. Transaction costs included (commission + slippage). Strategy must pass hard floor constraints on every window.
goals: Maximize net_sharpe (risk-adjusted returns) across all walk-forward windows. Hard floors: net_sharpe >= 0.5, max_drawdown <= 15%, win_rate >= 40%. Focus on entry/exit signal quality.
